title: sclerobassia litoralis
intro: Sclerobassia litoralis, a type of succulent plant, is native to South Africa and belongs to the family of flowering plants, Aizoaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sclerobassia litoralis include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a salve or ointment.
